name: ical-integration
description: Read and write your Mac Calendar (including iCloud) directly from Claude, via Apple's native EventKit framework. No credentials required.
long_description: iCal Integration gives Claude full access to your macOS Calendar database through Apple's EventKit framework, the same API used by Calendar.app and Fantastical. List calendars, fetch and search events, create, update, and delete events, and check your availability, all without entering any credentials. Any calendar visible in Calendar.app works, including iCloud, Google, Exchange, and local calendars.

tools.name: list_calendars
tools.description: List all calendars visible in Calendar.app (iCloud, Google, Exchange, local).

tools.name: get_events
tools.description: Fetch events within a date range, optionally filtered by calendar.

tools.name: search_events
tools.description: Search events by keyword across a configurable time window.

tools.name: update_event
tools.description: Update fields of an existing event by its id.

tools.name: delete_event
tools.description: Delete an event by its id.

tools.name: get_availability
tools.description: Return free and busy blocks for a date range to support scheduling.

tools.name: get_current_datetime
tools.description: Return the current local date, time, and timezone of the host machine.
